prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with high carbohydrate intake and optimized pre/post-workout nutrition timing

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers 1 full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
Includes pre-workout and post-workout meals with appropriate timing and macronutrient composition
Carbohydrates comprise 55-65% of total daily calories to support endurance training
Plan is compact and concise (under 400 tokens) while respecting all dietary restrictions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a professional endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific pre/post-workout nutrition timing

prompt_inputs.goal: optimize performance and recovery for soccer match day

solution_criteria: Meal plan is 1 day only and includes breakfast, lunch, pre-match, and post-match meals
All foods are vegan with no animal products
Provides adequate carbohydrates and protein to support soccer performance and recovery
Plan is concise and practical to prepare for a single athlete
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary constraint scenario (vegan soccer player) that requires meeting performance nutrition needs while respecting dietary restrictions

prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle gain with caloric surplus for strength training

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains 4-5 meals with protein distributed across each meal (minimum 30g per meal)
Total daily calories support a moderate surplus (approximately 500+ calories above maintenance)
Includes specific foods and approximate portion sizes for practical implementation
Compact format with clear meal timing and macronutrient focus on protein for muscle gain
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power sport athlete (weightlifter) emphasizing protein distribution across meals and caloric surplus for muscle gain
